scripts.lint: npm run lint:python && npm run lint:studio
scripts.lint:python: python3 -m ruff check farmacograph tests && python3 -m ruff format --check farmacograph tests
scripts.format: npm run format:python && npm run format:studio
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:python && npm run typecheck:studio
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:studio
scripts.test:python: FG_ENVIRONMENT=test FG_DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: FG_NEO4J_ENABLED=false FG_LOG_JSON=false python3 -m pytest -m "not integration"
scripts.test:python:integration: FG_ENVIRONMENT=test FG_DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: FG_NEO4J_ENABLED=false FG_LOG_JSON=false python3 -m pytest -m integration
scripts.test:python:contract: FG_ENVIRONMENT=test FG_DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: FG_NEO4J_ENABLED=false FG_LOG_JSON=false python3 -m pytest -m contract
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:python && npm run coverage:studio
scripts.coverage:python: FG_ENVIRONMENT=test FG_DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: FG_NEO4J_ENABLED=false FG_LOG_JSON=false python3 -m pytest -m "not integration" --cov=farmacograph --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
